---
title: "Welcome to My Analytics Lab"
sidebar: false 
---

Hello! My name is Mevlüt Görgülü

This is my personal webpage.

Please stay tuned to follow my works on data analytics, blog posts, and more.

![](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMndoNHdkbXZlMzM5b3RhanJjdG45ZmZzZnA0YWJ0ZmI0MXk3bmlvdiZlcD12MV9naWZzX3NlYXJjaCZjdD1n/IXnnnVD5kyKqXRhaCR/giphy.gif){width="346"}
